tool_input.command:
cat component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for s in data['sections']:
    if s['id'] in ['s7', 's9', 's14']:
        print(f\"=== {s['id']}: {s['title']} ===\")
        print(s['content'][:2000])
        print()
"
